prompts.text: "High" and "low" — tap a high key and a low key. Ask: "Which sounds higher? Which sounds lower?"
Ask: "Can you play something quiet? Now something loud? What do you do differently?"
When they find a pleasing sound, say: "That sounds lovely — play it again. Can you remember which key that was?"
Ask: "Can you play a happy sound? A sad sound? What makes it feel that way?"
